Package neqsim.process.operations

Class WaterHammerStudy

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.WaterHammerStudy
public final class WaterHammerStudy extends Object
Runs fast water-hammer and liquid-hammer screening studies from process, STID, and tag data.

The study facade converts a compact JSON specification into a WaterHammerPipe, applies route geometry from a pipe object or STID-style segment list, optionally overrides operating data from tagreader values, runs valve-closure transients, and returns a structured JSON result for notebooks, agents, and MCP tools.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

    Class

    private static final class 
    WaterHammerStudy.PipeGeometry
    Normalized equivalent pipe geometry for a screening water-hammer study.

  • Method Details

    • run

      public static String run(String studyJson)
      Runs a water-hammer study from a JSON input specification.
      Parameters:
      studyJson - JSON study input with fluid, route, pipe, tagreader, and valve-event data
      Returns:
      JSON result with pressure surge metrics, time series, envelopes, and warnings

    • run

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject run(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Runs a parsed water-hammer study input.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input object
      Returns:
      JSON result object

      private static SystemInterface createFluid(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Creates a thermodynamic fluid from the study input.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input
      Returns:
      configured NeqSim thermodynamic system

      private static Stream createFeedStream(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, SystemInterface fluid)
      Creates the inlet stream and applies flow-rate input or tagreader override.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input
      fluid - configured fluid
      Returns:
      feed stream for the transient pipe

    • createPipe

      private static WaterHammerPipe createPipe(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, WaterHammerStudy.PipeGeometry geometry, Stream feed)
      Creates and configures the water-hammer pipe from normalized geometry and input options.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input
      geometry - normalized pipe geometry
      feed - feed stream
      Returns:
      configured water-hammer pipe

    • readGeometry

      private static WaterHammerStudy.PipeGeometry readGeometry(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, List<String> warnings)
      Reads pipe geometry from pipe fields or a STID-style route segment list.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input
      warnings - mutable warning list
      Returns:
      normalized equivalent pipe geometry

    • applyRouteSegments

      private static void applyRouteSegments(com.google.gson.JsonArray segments, WaterHammerStudy.PipeGeometry geometry, List<String> warnings)
      Aggregates route segments into equivalent single-line geometry for fast screening.
      Parameters:
      segments - route segment array
      geometry - geometry object to update
      warnings - mutable warning list

    • estimateEquivalentMinorLossLength

      private static double estimateEquivalentMinorLossLength(com.google.gson.JsonObject segment, double diameter)
      Estimates equivalent length for segment minor losses using a screening friction factor.
      Parameters:
      segment - route segment JSON object
      diameter - segment diameter in meters
      Returns:
      equivalent length added by minor losses in meters

    • getEventSchedule

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray getEventSchedule(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, double initialOpening)
      Returns the event schedule or creates a default valve closure event.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input
      initialOpening - initial valve opening fraction
      Returns:
      event schedule array

    • getDefaultClosureDuration

      private static double getDefaultClosureDuration(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Gets the default valve closure duration from input or a screening default.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input
      Returns:
      closure duration in seconds

    • applyValveEvents

      private static void applyValveEvents(WaterHammerPipe pipe, com.google.gson.JsonArray events, double time)
      Applies all active valve events at the current transient time.
      Parameters:
      pipe - transient pipe
      events - event schedule array
      time - current simulation time in seconds

    • addSample

      private static void addSample(com.google.gson.JsonArray timeArray, com.google.gson.JsonArray pressureArray, com.google.gson.JsonArray openingArray, double time, double pressureBar, double valveOpening)
      Adds a sampled transient point to the output arrays.
      Parameters:
      timeArray - time output array
      pressureArray - pressure output array
      openingArray - valve opening output array
      time - time in seconds
      pressureBar - outlet pressure in bar
      valveOpening - valve opening fraction

    • buildInputSummary

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildInputSummary(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, WaterHammerStudy.PipeGeometry geometry, WaterHammerPipe pipe, Stream feed)
      Builds the input summary for the JSON result.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input
      geometry - normalized geometry
      pipe - configured pipe
      feed - inlet stream
      Returns:
      input summary JSON object

    • buildKeyResults

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildKeyResults(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, WaterHammerPipe pipe, double initialOutletPressureBar, double initialVelocity, double timeStep, double simulationTime)
      Builds key study results.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input
      pipe - simulated pipe
      initialOutletPressureBar - initial outlet pressure in bar
      initialVelocity - initial pipe velocity in meters per second
      timeStep - time step used in seconds
      simulationTime - simulated duration in seconds
      Returns:
      key results JSON object

    • buildTimeSeries

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildTimeSeries(com.google.gson.JsonArray sampledTime, com.google.gson.JsonArray sampledOutletPressure, com.google.gson.JsonArray sampledValveOpening)
      Builds sampled transient time-series output.
      Parameters:
      sampledTime - sampled time array
      sampledOutletPressure - sampled outlet pressure array
      sampledValveOpening - sampled valve opening array
      Returns:
      time-series JSON object
